name: cabinet-kitchen-marketing-kit
description: Complete compliance-moated marketing system for cabinet refacing and kitchen cabinetry contractors — NV NSCB B-2/C-3 license gating, KCMA/ANSI A161.1 quality disclosure, CARB Phase 2 formaldehyde compliance, EPA RRP Rule for pre-1978 homes, soft-close hardware warranty accuracy (Magnuson-Moss), GREENGUARD Gold certification enforcement, and FTC 2023 enforcement in every output.
author: max_0x1
